mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_news_seq ,n.post_type ,n.title ,n.content ,n.post_date ,n.view_count ,n.top_yn ,n.top_start_date ,n.top_end_date ,n.use_yn ,n.file_seq ,n.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,cu.name AS rgst_user_name ,n.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,n.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,uu.name AS upt_user_name ,n.updated_at AS upt_date_time FROM event.notice_news n LEFT JOIN event.users cu ON cu.user_seq = n.created_by LEFT JOIN event.users uu ON uu.user_seq = n.updated_by WHERE n.notice_news_seq = #{noticeNewsSeq} AND n.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE event.notice_news SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE notice_news_seq = #{noticeNewsSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL
